review_summary.college_name: TRR College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you choose another college rather than this one.

content.Placements: None of the students from our course got placed. Companies do not visit our college for placements. None of the students from our course got an internship at the college. Roles like developer, trainee, etc., are offered in our course. It was not a good college.
content.Infrastructure: It has poor infrastructure. There are no proper Wi-Fi labs. Classrooms are too small, and they are half repaired. Our college does not provide a hostel facility. The college construction was a half-baked type. The college stopped construction in between, and it is left like that. Classrooms are not much good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: College is very peaceful environment for study but placement facility should improve.

content.Placements: Around 20 per cent of students got placed in this course. The highest package offered for this course is 6 lakhs per annum, the lowest package for this course is 4 lakhs per annum and the average package is 5 lakhs per annum. Recruiting companies like Hcl, Toshiba transformation and distribution are there. Computer science and engineering, electrical and electronics engineering and electronics and communication engineering are the best course offered in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Almost every facility is available and infrastructure is very good like free Wi-Fi, Wi-Fi labs and classrooms are well maintained. Medical facilities are there because for TRR medical college. Besides our engineering college, canteen and sports games are maintained and efficient.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college is only good for electrical students, and does not have any extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: There are no placements provided in our college. The placement percentage of our seniors was zero. The average salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month and the highest was Rs. 50,000 per month. Not even one company visited the college till now. There are internships provided, but there is no use of those internships as they don't provide any employment in future, and there is no stipend too.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available, and the labs are not good. The library is good, but there are no medical facilities provided. Sports are conducted yearly once, and students are not allowed to play in the ground every day. The quality of the classrooms is not bad, and the hostel is the worst. I faced many issues in college every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Best college from my bottom of heart. I would suggest all to join in this college.

content.Placements: I would say, contribute both Maintain a 65% + grade in academics. That would be your gateway to appear for placements of several good companies. By participating a co-curricular and extra curricular activities you will be buliding you resume. Companies would always choose people who have worked in a team or make different project or the one who like to compete. These are few skill that a company looking for in a new employee. I would suggest to all do best in all activities amd and studies.
content.Infrastructure: When it became about college infrastructure the college was accredited 'Best infrastructure of the year' everyone should like the college and it is best infrastructure. The facilities like Wi-Fi, games, classes, labs, sports all are good. The food quality is also very good and tasty. You will not any problem related to the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The worst college with worthless staff.

content.Placements: There are no placements here. Not even BPOs come here as this is just a college to get the bachelor's degree. The only preference that lecturers give here is based on caste or to rich people. They respect them and also award them full marks in their internals. There will be no placement assistant or at least campus training here.
content.Infrastructure: The college atmosphere is very good. One can enjoy the nature around the college. The cons of this college are as follows, there is no Wi-Fi for the students, but every department has its own Wi-Fi, only for the faculty members and their favourite students. Also, the labs here are just showcased with worthless equipment. The classrooms here are well-spacious.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to study.

content.Placements: Around 15% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs.24,000 per month, the lowest salary was Rs.14,000 per month, and the average salary was Rs.18,000 per month. NEPL, TCS, and Siemens were the top recruiting companies. Around 20% of students got internships in our course at Visakhapatnam steel. Project engineer roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college were labs, classrooms, and a library. Hostel provided quality infrastructure and served good quality food. Medical facility was provided monthly and had an emergency facility at hostel. Basketball, cricket, football, and chess were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college, and they have to improve a lot of things.

content.Placements: Nearly 40% of the students got placed in top MNC companies. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA. Nearly 50% of the students got an internship in various companies to improve their skills and development for job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs and classrooms are very good. Year once they conduct sports in our college. Canteen is the worst, and the food is also very bad.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of our college are very friendly and helpful. They provide valuable material to us to prepare for mid and external exams. The course is very important for everyone to prepare for exams. It is relevant to improve students skills and experience. Teachers give materials and complete the syllabus within time.
